{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-w6xc-g9qj-vp32. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
The safe_traversal module in uutils coreutils, which provides protection against Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) symlink races using file-descriptor-relative syscalls, is incorrectly limited to Linux targets. On other Unix-like systems such as macOS and FreeBSD, the utility fails to utilize these protections, leaving directory traversal operations vulnerable to symlink race conditions.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-ggc5-46rg-mr4v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:17:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ggc5-46rg-mr4v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-ggc5-46rg-mr4v"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35362", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/9792", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.6.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/30239e69a328e76d2377f2a0bc02fbde61c34280", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ggc5-46rg-mr4v"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T20:25:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-ggc5-46rg-mr4v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T20:25:08Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition
